        "#1.load the data (our own dat)\n",
        "x=[[1,1,4],[15,16,17],[1,2,6],[18,19,9],[10,11,17]]\n",

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "#1.load the data (our own dat)\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "file=pd.read_csv(\"/content/irisexcel.csv\")\n",
        "x=file[[\"sepal_length\",\"sepal_width\",\"petal_length\",\"petal_width\"]]\n",
        "y=file[\"species\"]\n",
        "#2.load the model(preceptron)\n",
        "from sklearn.linear_model import Perceptron\n",
        "model= Perceptron()\n",
        "#3.fit data into model\n",
        "model.fit(x,y)\n",
        "#testing predicto\n",
        "op=model.predict([[5.6,6.5,7.5,8.5]])\n",
        "print(op)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "2uHAaGEAPZX0",

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "#1.load the data (our own dat)\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "file=pd.read_csv(\"/content/irisexcel.csv\")\n",
        "x=file[[\"sepal_length\",\"sepal_width\",\"petal_length\",\"petal_width\"]]\n",
        "y=file[\"species\"]\n",
        "#cross validation\n",
        "from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split\n",
        "xtrain,xtest,ytrain,ytest=train_test_split(x,y,test_size=0.2)\n",
        "#2.load the model(preceptron)\n",
        "from sklearn.linear_model import Perceptron\n",
        "model= Perceptron()\n",
        "#3.fit data into model\n",
        "model.fit(xtrain,ytrain)\n",
        "#validation\n",
        "op=model.predict(xtest)\n",
        "from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score\n",
        "score=accuracy_score(ytest,op)\n",
        "print(\"accuracy=\",score*100)\n",
        "#testing predicto\n",
        "op2=model.predict([[5.6,6.5,7.5,8.5]])\n",
        "print(op2)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "FwqqwBSyeCMO",
        "outputId": "caaa304f-cd5f-45af-cad5-8659caea8f8c"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "accuracy= 90.0\n",
            "['virginica']\n"
          ]
        },
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stderr",

            "  warnings.warn(\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "#1.load the data (our own dat)\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "file=pd.read_csv(\"/content/13 MLP winequality-red.csv\")\n",
        "x=file[[\"citric acid\",\"residual sugar\",\"chlorides\",\"free sulfur dioxide\",\"total sulfur dioxide\"]]\n",
        "y=file[\"quality\"]\n",
        "#cross validation\n",
        "from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split\n",
        "xtrain,xtest,ytrain,ytest=train_test_split(x,y,test_size=0.2)\n",
        "#2.load the model(preceptron)\n",
        "from sklearn.linear_model import Perceptron\n",
        "model= Perceptron()\n",
        "#3.fit data into model\n",
        "model.fit(xtrain,ytrain)\n",
        "#validation\n",
        "op=model.predict(xtest)\n",
        "from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score\n",
        "score=accuracy_score(ytest,op)\n",
        "print(\"accuracy=\",score*100)\n",
        "#testing predicto\n",
        "op2=model.predict([[5.6,0.5,7.5,8.5,5.6]])\n",
        "print(op2)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "_N_RNm0thzkR",
        "outputId": "3813c04c-7111-4176-cb87-345ab7495e25"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "accuracy= 50.31250000000001\n",
            "[6]\n"
          ]
        },
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stderr",
          "text": [
            "/usr/local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages/sklearn/utils/validation.py:2739: UserWarning: X does not have valid feature names, but Perceptron was fitted with feature names\n",
            "  warnings.warn(\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "from sklearn.metrics import confusion_matrix, ConfusionMatrixDisplay\n",
        "cm=confusion_matrix(ytest,op)\n",
        "print(cm)\n",
        "\n",
        "cmd=ConfusionMatrixDisplay(confusion_matrix=cm,display_labels=model.classes_)\n",
        "cmd.plot()"
      ],
